summary: Executed backend pytest regression and frontend Playwright validation for Gatherings invite/roles/zoom enhancements on public preview URL. All targeted backend and UI flows passed, including recurring-event immediate rendering regression check.
action_items: Optional maintainability: split backend/server.py into domain routers/services (file remains >700 lines).
Optional testability: avoid overlapping data-testid prefixes for invite card wrappers vs nested invite message/zoom elements to keep selector targeting cleaner.
critical_code_review_comments: No blocking backend/frontend defects found in tested Gatherings invite/role/zoom and recurring flows.
backend/server.py remains oversized and should be modularized to reduce long-term regression risk.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST/UI communities and records via public APIs/UI: hybrid and recurring events, event invites (member + guest), custom role assignment with multiple assignees, checklist interaction.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest now includes dedicated Gatherings invite/roles/zoom coverage in /app/backend/tests/test_gatherings_invites_roles_zoom.py. Full backend suite passed (18/18). Playwright run confirmed Gatherings create with zoom link, invite records + share message including zoom, custom multi-assignee roles, and recurring children visible immediately after create.
rca of the issue: Previously reported recurring UI sync issue was not reproducible in this run. Reproduction path retested (create weekly event and inspect list immediately) now shows 6 cards without reload, indicating fix is effective.
